Computer virus and code of conduct​

Rojal  tamang ​

What is computer virus ​
​

  • •A computer virus is a program intentionally written using a programming language to damage data or programs or disrupt computer users. The Internet is a primary source of viruses. When we open a virus infected file from the Internet, the virus can easily transfer to our computer without knowledge. A virus can also transfer to computer system thought virus infected pen drives , memory card, DVDs, or other secondary storage devices. ​

Some measures to protect a computer system are; ​

  • •1 ) We should not open unknow mail of the internet without confirmation.​

  • •2) we should always not the firewall protect that protects computer system from malicious program. ​

  • •3) We should check and confirm free software before using them. ​

  • •4) We should use strong anti - virus software that protect the computer system.​

  • •5) We should regularly scan the storage device such as hard disk, pen drive, memory card, ect. ​

Some symptom of computer infected by virus​

  1. 1)The speed of the computer becomes slow .​

  2. 2)The location of files may change ​

  3. 3)The file side may change ​

  4. 4)An infected computer may restart automatically ​

  5. 5)Unnecessary sound may be produced by viruses ​

Follow the following step to remove viruses from the computer ​

  1. 1)Install any strong anti-virus software ​

  2. 2)Update it regularly using the internet ​

  3. 3)Scan the computer system regularly ​

  4. 4)If any virus is found then delete it according to the instructions, otherwise, it provides a message as given below; ​

​
 ​

5​

Code of conducts for computer and internet users ​

A computer is a tool that  make our work easier and simpler. With the help of     the internet, we can quickly exchange information with other  users. However, problems may arise if we do not know how to use it properly. Som important guidelines for computer and Internet users are given on the next page:​

  1. 1)Do not share your password with others.​

  2. 2)You should not share personal or group photos with other without their permission. ​

  3. 3)Do no create fake accounts on social media.​

  4. 4)You should not open email sent by unknown persons without verification.​

  5. 5)Never open unknown spam emails and do not sent such emails to others.​
